name: Flexofast Indonesia
message: www.flexofast.com , https://www.zoominfo.com/c/flexofast-indonesia/556142095 , Flexofast serves as a premier logistics partner for brands and companies in Indonesia, providing innovative and customized solutions to enhance their operational capabilities. The company emphasizes fast, reliable, and sustainable logistics services, aligning with its commitment to reducing environmental impact. It offers cutting-edge logistics, connecting shippers with transporters, and manages transactions across various marketplaces. Additionally, Flexofast functions as a digital marketing and social commerce agency, specializing in content strategy and short-form video production.
